@graph.name: Effective Keloid Removal Treatment in Malaysia for Lasting Keloid Scar Control
@graph.description: Raised, itchy scars that keep growing and do not respond to creams alone. Nexus Clinic KL diagnoses whether you have a true keloid or a hypertrophic scar and builds a combination treatment programme matched to your site, size and skin type. Book your free assessment today.
